actual_code_formula.description: AI = unweighted mean of 5 salience dimensions (per 03_compute_attention_index_v3.py line 430-432). The Paper 2 SI uses a 4-component renaming that drops S_frequency_normalized for anti-circularity. The code presently retains the 5-component formula; the 4-component variant is documented below for reproducibility from the SI.

components_in_code.S_acoustic: Proportion of cue occurrences at utterance-final position (prosody-end proxy when no audio).
components_in_code.S_positional: max(P(first decile), P(last decile)) - 1/n_bins ; positional edge bias.
components_in_code.S_frequency_normalized: sigmoid(z-score of log token count within language).  Equivalent to log-frequency squashed to [0,1].
components_in_code.S_perceptual: min Levenshtein distance to other cue surface forms / max(len) ; orthographic distinctiveness.

actual_code_formula.code_weights: Equal weights, w_i = 0.2 each. Implemented at 03_compute_attention_index_v3.py:431.

paper2_SI_4component_mapping.description: The four-component Paper 2 SI formula drops S_frequency_normalized to make COI anti-circular w.r.t. log-token-frequency.

per_component_scaling.S_positional: Computed as a probability difference in [-1/n_bins, 1 - 1/n_bins]; no further scaling. Range observed approximately [-0.1, +0.9].
per_component_scaling.S_repetition: Log-scaled within [0, 1] (formula floors at 0 for cues with no host, caps at 1.0 for cues with >= 100 host lemmas).
per_component_scaling.S_perceptual: Bounded in [0, 1]; min Levenshtein distance / max(len). Cues with no comparison neighbour get neutral 0.5.
per_component_scaling.S_frequency_normalized: Computed as sigmoid(z-score of log count) where z-score uses within-language mean/sd of log counts. Bounded in (0, 1) by sigmoid.

within_corpus_z_scoring: z-scoring is applied to per-cue log token counts BEFORE the sigmoid transform (S_frequency component only). The four other components are NOT z-scored; they are used in their native [0,1] range and combined by equal-weighted unweighted mean.

missing_data_rule.rule_applied: Listwise cue exclusion for any cue with count < min_cue_count (--min_cue_count, default 5). Components that would otherwise be undefined return 0.0 (S_acoustic, S_positional, S_repetition) or 0.5 (S_perceptual, when no neighbour cue exists) rather than NaN. NaN cues are dropped from downstream COI computations.
